title: Second-pass optimization for CLI accuracy evaluation throughput
description:
## Goal
Run a second performance pass on CLI accuracy evaluations after initial async item-lookup fix.

## Scope
- Identify next dominant bottleneck in per-item scoring path
- Implement safe optimization to improve throughput
- Validate with targeted local checks and summarize expected impact

## Definition of Done
- One concrete bottleneck fixed
- Code compiles/tests for touched area pass
- Results recorded in Kanbus comments

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Started second optimization pass. Next step is tracing per-item scoring internals to find the next dominant blocking/expensive operation after async item-lookup fix.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented second-pass optimization in plexus/Scorecard.py: removed redundant per-item score re-instantiation in score_entire_text.process_score (it was calling await score_class.create(...) after prediction just for metrics). Cost/token accounting is already done in get_score_result, so this duplicate setup was pure overhead and could trigger extra LangGraph workflow setup work per item. Kept lightweight ItemTokens and CostPerText metrics logging. Validation: python -m py_compile plexus/Scorecard.py plexus/Evaluation.py passes.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Validation/risk follow-up: ran targeted tests in py311-dev env after Scorecard optimization patch. Commands: /home/derek/miniconda3/envs/py311-dev/bin/pytest -q plexus/tests/test_processor_e2e_validation.py (13 passed) and /home/derek/miniconda3/envs/py311-dev/bin/pytest -q plexus/test_evaluation_metrics.py (19 passed). Functional risk appears low for scoring outputs and evaluation metrics. Residual risk: telemetry semantics changed because duplicate per-score cost/token CloudWatch metric emissions in score_entire_text were removed; if any downstream dashboard depended on those duplicate emissions specifically, counts could differ.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Landed on branch fix/evaluations-speed in commit 605c5fa8. Change removes redundant post-predict score re-instantiation in Scorecard.score_entire_text; keeps ItemTokens and CostPerText metric logging; cost/token accounting continues in get_score_result. Targeted tests previously run and passing in py311-dev env.
